queries.question: What programs do all authorities have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.program_name  from Authorities_Programs join Programs on Authorities_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Authorities on Authorities_Programs.authority_id = Authorities.authority_id   GROUP BY Authorities_Programs.program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Authorities_Programs.authority_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Authorities)

queries.question: Provide me with the program description that is common for all authorities.
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.description  from Authorities_Programs join Programs on Authorities_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Authorities on Authorities_Programs.authority_id = Authorities.authority_id   GROUP BY Authorities_Programs.program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Authorities_Programs.authority_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Authorities)

queries.question: For every authority, list the programs they have.
queries.sql: select authorities.name , programs.program_name from Authorities_Programs join Programs on Authorities_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Authorities on Authorities_Programs.authority_id = Authorities.authority_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?program_name WHERE {
  ?authorities_programs a :Authorities_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?authorities_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?authorities a :Authorities .
  ?authorities_programs p:hasAuthorities ?authorities .
  ?authorities p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:program_name ?program_name .
}

queries.question: Please display the name and description of programs that are consistent across all authorities
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.program_name, Programs.description  from Authorities_Programs join Programs on Authorities_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Authorities on Authorities_Programs.authority_id = Authorities.authority_id   GROUP BY Authorities_Programs.program_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Authorities_Programs.authority_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Authorities)

queries.question: which program descriptions are associated with each authority?
queries.sql: select authorities.name , programs.description from Authorities_Programs join Programs on Authorities_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Authorities on Authorities_Programs.authority_id = Authorities.authority_id

queries.question: Could you provide the name and description of programs associated with each authority?
queries.sql: select authorities.name , programs.program_name , programs.description from Authorities_Programs join Programs on Authorities_Programs.program_id = Programs.program_id join Authorities on Authorities_Programs.authority_id = Authorities.authority_id

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?program_name ?description WHERE {
  ?authorities_programs a :Authorities_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?authorities_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?authorities a :Authorities .
  ?authorities_programs p:hasAuthorities ?authorities .
  ?authorities p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:program_name ?program_name .
  ?programs p:description ?description .
}
